title: Something's Wrong..
description: A horror modpack utilizing the '000' mod. The horror is much more psychological and doesn't prioritize loud jumpscares.
body:
Step into a world where silence is more terrifying than noise. This modpack isn’t about relentless monsters or constant chases—it’s about the unease that creeps in when you realize something is just… off. Inspired by the eerie atmosphere of Minecraft’s older versions, this pack transforms the game into an experience where the horror lurks in the environment itself.

You won’t be forced into fear; instead, the world subtly distorts around you, leaving you questioning every shadow, every distant sound. The events are random, configurable, and uniquely tailored to keep you on edge. Will you push forward, or will the uncertainty break you first?

Prepare for an unsettling journey—where the true terror is what you don’t see.

[000.jar](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ooo-jar)
